title: TIME-DOMAIN ANALYSIS OF CONTINUOUS-TIME SYSTEMS
summary: This page explains why a system with time constant T_h behaves like a lowpass filter by comparing convolution with high- and low-frequency sinusoids. It defines the cutoff frequency and bandwidth as f_c = 1/T_h, then relates bandwidth inversely to rise time through T_r = 1/f_c and the more general form f_c = k/T_r.
